ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "date_bet" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "bet_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in placing the bet */,
  "bsp_reconciled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the best starting price (BSP) has been reconciled */,
  "complete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event is complete */,
  "inplay" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event is in-play */,
  "last_match_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last match time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the event data */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., football, basketball, tennis) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is taking place */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "live_stream_url" TEXT /* URL for live streaming the event */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES event_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the bet is placed on */,
  "number_of_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners in the event */,
  "number_of_runners" INTEGER /* Total number of runners in the event */,
  "number_of_active_runners" INTEGER /* Number of active runners in the event */,
  "total_matched" REAL /* Total amount matched in the bet */,
  "total_available" REAL /* Total amount available for betting */,
  "cross_matching" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if cross-matching is allowed */,
  "runners_voidable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if runners can be voided */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  "bet_odds" REAL /* Odds for the bet */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., PENDING, SETTLED) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "bet_source" TEXT /* Source of the bet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "bet_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., ACTIVE, SUSPENDED) */,
  "preferred_sports" TEXT /* Preferred sports of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bets" (
  "user_bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-bet relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet placed */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., WIN, LOSE, PENDING) */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  "bet_odds" REAL /* Odds for the bet */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "bet_source" TEXT /* Source of the bet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "bet_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the bet */,
  "reconciliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reconciliation record if the bet has been reconciled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_reconciliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reconciliation_id") REFERENCES bet_reconciliation ("reconciliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version change (e.g., CORRECTION, UPDATE) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runners" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the runner is part of */,
  "runner_name" TEXT /* Name of the runner */,
  "runner_status" TEXT /* Status of the runner (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "voidable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the runner can be voided */,
  "runner_type" TEXT /* Type of the runner (e.g., horse, player, team) */,
  "runner_odds" REAL /* Odds for the runner */,
  "runner_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the runner's status (e.g., injury, disqualification) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the runner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runners_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_reconciliation" (
  "reconciliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reconciliation */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet being reconciled */,
  "reconciliation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reconciliation was performed */,
  "reconciliation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reconciliation (e.g., PENDING, COMPLETED) */,
  "reconciliation_amount" REAL /* Amount reconciled */,
  "reconciled_by" TEXT /* User who performed the reconciliation */,
  "reconciliation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reconciliation */,
  "reconciliation_type" TEXT /* Type of reconciliation (e.g., AUTOMATIC, MANUAL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reconciliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_reconciliation_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., BET, VIEW, ADMIN) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., READ, WRITE, ADMIN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., WIN, LOSE, PENDING) */,
  "reconciliation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was reconciled */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  "bet_odds" REAL /* Odds for the bet */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "bet_source" TEXT /* Source of the bet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "bet_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the bet */,
  "reconciliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reconciliation record if the bet has been reconciled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_history_reconciliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reconciliation_id") REFERENCES bet_reconciliation ("reconciliation_id")
)
